name: Functions Under 40 Lines
description: Functions longer than 40 lines are hard to test and review. Extract sub-functions.
auto_fix_hint: Extract logical sections into private helper functions

name: Magic Numbers as Named Constants
description: Numeric literals in business logic must be named constants with clear intent.
auto_fix_hint: Extract to static let constant with descriptive name

examples.good:
private static let highValueThreshold: Decimal = 50000
if amount > Self.highValueThreshold { requireAdditionalAuth() }

name: No TODO/FIXME in Production Code
description: TODO and FIXME comments in merged code indicate incomplete implementation. They must be tracked in Jira, not code.
auto_fix_hint: Create a Jira ticket and remove the comment, or implement the fix before merging

examples.bad:
// TODO: validate amount before transfer
// FIXME: this crashes with nil account

name: Descriptive Variable Names
description: Variables must have descriptive names. Single-letter names (except loop counters) degrade readability.

examples.bad:
let x = api.fetch()
let d = formatter.string(from: date)
examples.good:
let accountBalance = api.fetchBalance()
let formattedDate = formatter.string(from: transactionDate)
